metric_value: 'It is like the Bluetooth gun went off, but everyone stumbled across the start line.' Microsoft Wireless Optical Desktop for Bluetooth is the key catalyst making the Bluetooth marketplace happen.
notes: Kastner as chief research officer at Aberdeen Group

metric_value: Microsoft Wireless Optical Desktop for Bluetooth unveiled as first major-brand Bluetooth keyboard+mouse bundle with USB transceiver.
Positioned around mobile phones integrating with PC via Bluetooth; enables laptop users to leave handset in pocket/briefcase.
Kastner endorsement implies Bluetooth PC peripherals will go mainstream following this launch.
By 2010 Bluetooth peripherals were standard; by 2020 the standard was ubiquitous across phones, laptops, wearables, cars.
